query: INSERT INTO workspace_member (workspace_id, principal, role, status, invited_by, added_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'invited', $4, $5) ON CONFLICT (workspace_id, principal) DO UPDATE SET role = CASE WHEN workspace_member.status = 'confirmed' THEN workspace_member.role ELSE excluded.role END, invited_by = excluded.invited_by, status = CASE WHEN workspace_member.status = 'confirmed' THEN 'confirmed' ELSE 'invited' END
